steps.title: Inventory evidence and uncertainty
actions: Record image dimensions, crop, scale, browser clues, and visible states.
Classify each decision as observed, inferred, or assumed.
List missing assets, fonts, viewports, and interactions.
exit_criteria: Material uncertainty is visible and not presented as observed fact.

steps.title: Measure structure before styling
actions: Estimate viewport, outer frame, columns, anchors, gaps, measures, and repeated dimensions.
Identify likely layout primitives and source order.
Create proportional annotations rather than isolated pixel guesses.
exit_criteria: A coherent layout model explains repeated alignments and spacing.

steps.title: Recover visual foundations
actions: Identify type roles, color roles, radius families, border/elevation rules, icon grammar, and image treatment.
Match font metrics before tuning local spacing.
Create tokens for repeated observed values.
exit_criteria: Repeated visual decisions are systemic rather than per-element overrides.

steps.title: Build the observed viewport first
actions: Implement semantic structure and visible state.
Use known assets and neutral system-consistent handling for gaps.
Avoid inventing off-screen sections or unsupported behavior.
exit_criteria: Observed content and geometry are represented without fabricated proof or patterns.

steps.title: Compare with overlays and regions
actions: Capture at the exact reference viewport.
Use opacity overlays, region crops, and anchor deltas.
Correct in order: frame, geometry, type metrics, color, effects, then micro-detail.
exit_criteria: Remaining differences are below the agreed tolerance or documented as evidence gaps.

steps.title: Infer only defensible responsive rules
actions: Use additional references and content failure points to define adaptation.
Preserve source order and task hierarchy.
Label responsive behavior not directly observed as designed inference.
exit_criteria: All supported widths work and inferred behavior is distinguished from reference fidelity.

steps.title: Verify implementation quality beyond pixels
actions: Run accessibility, state, performance, and browser gates.
Confirm no screenshot artifact was reproduced as intentional behavior.
Deliver a fidelity report with assumptions and known deltas.
exit_criteria: Visual parity and production-quality behavior are independently evidenced.
